pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin configuration to use the 'release' flag instead of separate source/target flags for Java 11 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the recommended way to compile for Java 9+ and ensures API leakage prevention; while source/target 8 works on JDK 11, the migration intent is to adopt the modern standard.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update project properties to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
